mapper.select:
SELECT attrelid::regclass as tbl_id, attnum as col_uid, attname as col_id, (SELECT col_description(attrelid, attnum)) AS col_nm
FROM pg_attribute
WHERE attrelid in ( 'xeus.mt_aces_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_allow_ip'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_asset_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_auth_grp'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_auth_list'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_auth_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_cmm_cde'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_msg_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_notc_list'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_orgz_desc'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_usr_desc'::regclass , 'xeus.mt_sym_icon'::regclass , 'xeus.mon_cctv_log'::regclass , 'xeus.mon_evet_hist'::regclass , 'xeus.mon_preview'::regclass , 'xeus.mon_stillcut_log'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_hist'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_cctv'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_cctv_vms'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_cctv_model'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_site'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_infra'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_status'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_status_hist'::regclass , 'xeus.asset_site_hist'::regclass , 'xeus.crms_trans_rqst'::regclass , 'xeus.crms_rqst_renew'::regclass ) AND attnum > 0 AND NOT attisdropped AND attname NOT IN('_geometry', '_annox', '_annoy')
ORDER BY attrelid, attnum;

SELECT attrelid::regclass as tbl_id, attnum as col_uid, attname as col_id, (SELECT col_description(attrelid, attnum)) AS col_nm, info.data_type
FROM pg_attribute as attr
,(SELECT * FROM information_schema. COLUMNS WHERE table_schema = 'xeus' AND TABLE_NAME = #{tbl} AND COLUMN_NAME NOT IN ( '_annox', '_annoy', '_geometry' )) as info
WHERE attrelid in ( 'xeus.${tbl}'::regclass ) AND attnum > 0 AND NOT attisdropped AND attname NOT IN('_geometry', '_annox', '_annoy')
AND attr.attname = info.column_name
ORDER BY attnum;
